positive: A stylized cosmic wanderer portrait featuring a single, graceful figure in deep indigo and burnt orange flowing robes, standing amidst crystalline nebula formations. The composition is highly centralized, focusing on the figure's serene yet powerful silhouette. Use an ethereal, vaporwave aesthetic with strong dramatic backlighting that casts defined, clean shadows. The style should mimic high-contrast vector art mixed with soft, glowing bioluminescence, suitable for textile printing. The color palette must be limited to rich blues, magentas, oranges, and crisp white highlights. Minimalist yet maximalist detail.
